case_title: AUTOVEST LLC VS. JENNY TRAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200007197)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTOVEST LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, JENNY DOES 1 THROUGH 15 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-13-2020

DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100048562) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTOVEST LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-03-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
